title: springy jammy algerian caramelized sugar sauce tagine
description: a traditional algerian dish featuring a rich caramelized sugar sauce and tender meat
instructions: bring the sugar and water to a boil in a large saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the mixture turns a deep amber color.
add the chopped apples, orange blossom water, lemon juice, and almond extract to the saucepan and stir to combine.
cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the apples are tender and the sauce has thickened.
stir in the honey and flour to combine.
cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened to your liking.
remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the unsalted butter until melted.
serve the tagine warm, garnished with additional chopped apples if desired.
